name: two-pass reconciler logs an adjacent classification without auto-promoting (related but not the same scope)
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"pattern_id":"p5","matched_rule_id":"r-existing","classification":"adjacent"}\n' > decision.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/apply-classification.sh" --decision decision.json --dry-run --log pr-corpus/adjacent.jsonl 2>out.txt && grep -q 'action=log-only' out.txt && grep -q 'auto_promote=false' out.txt && grep -q '"classification":"adjacent"' pr-corpus/adjacent.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
